clusters.summary: Patient-choice-expiry timer proof is still blocked by the frozen upstream seam, so 338 records the gap explicitly and does not claim end-to-end SLA coverage for that timer family.
notes: Upstream seam owner: batch 316 to 323 queue patient-choice expiry
Non-blocking for the current 338 release decision because other SLA timer families are still proved end to end
Must remain explicit until the queue patient-choice expiry projection is implemented and browser-proved
